mechanics.excerpt: War followed war in the wake of Kerensky dramatic departure_ For nearly three centures; the Houses of the Inner Sphere fought vain for the right t0 rule: These Succession Wars forged new alliances and cost the Inner Sphere precious irreplaceable technolo gy: Constantly maneuvering for position, the House Lords assumed that the greatest enemy they would ever face was each other They were Wtong; While the Inner Sphere sank into barbarism, Kerensky'$ followers built new society in the harsh environs beyond known space: They developed rigid caste system based on eugenics and martial ideals, designed to produce the ultimate warriors For nearly three hundred years they were unified by one burning goal: that when the time was right; they would return home ad conquer the Inner Sphere They planned t0 be the saviors of humanity and t0 rebuild the Star League in their own image.
